system_identity.system_scope: LLM financial-agent audit, reliability evaluation, risk-control, execution-calibration, and replayable evidence generation
system_identity.leaderboard_scope: public ranking and benchmark-card surface for comparable auditable agent runs
system_identity.forbidden_headline_claim: TradeArena proves that an LLM can trade profitably

paper_positioning.primary_route: ICLR agent evaluation and reliability paper
paper_positioning.main_thesis: LLM financial-agent evaluation is not stable unless execution assumptions, memory contamination, risk intervention, auditability, and provider drift are first-class protocol variables.
paper_positioning.negative_result_policy: LLM underperformance against simple anchors is a publishable reliability finding when the protocol explains why apparent trading skill disappears under realistic constraints.
not_in_scope: model-level trading skill claim from routed-provider rows

headline_results.routed_provider_policy: Poe or other routed-provider rows may appear only as historical, appendix, or provider-drift evidence.
headline_results.cache_policy: Cache hits must retain the original direct-provider manifest hash and call window.

failure_accounting.provider_call_failure: record a failure row with provider, model, scenario, seed, sample index, and error class
failure_accounting.retry: record retry_count and retain the final accepted response hash
failure_accounting.parse_failure: count parse coverage and use documented fallback behavior
failure_accounting.dropped_row: allowed only when the pre-registered invalid-row rule applies

execution_ladder.name: ideal
execution_ladder.claim_scope: upper-bound comparison under idealized close-price execution

execution_ladder.name: paper_stress
execution_ladder.claim_scope: shared stress comparison with fees, spread, slippage, latency, liquidity caps, and market impact

execution_ladder.name: stress_grid
execution_ladder.claim_scope: sensitivity analysis over spread, latency, participation, and impact assumptions

execution_ladder.name: quote_or_fill_replay
execution_ladder.claim_scope: calibrated or replay evidence with venue, symbol, timestamp, and quote/fill provenance

contamination_tiers.name: anonymized_real
contamination_tiers.claim_scope: pattern-recognition evaluation with residual contamination risk measured by probes

contamination_tiers.name: forward_frozen
contamination_tiers.claim_scope: strongest public evidence against memorized historical answers

deterministic_baseline.required_rows: all C0 main scenarios across E0, E1, and E2

finaudit_track.ground_truth_policy: Defects must be injected with machine-checkable answer keys before model evaluation.

claim_boundaries.engineering: TreLLM records replayable trajectories, risk reports, execution reports, manifests, and hashes.
claim_boundaries.benchmark: Under a frozen protocol, execution assumptions, contamination controls, and risk gates can change measured outcomes.
claim_boundaries.scientific: Model-specific reliability claims require direct APIs, repeated seeds and samples, contamination labels, statistical tests, and comparisons against fixed non-LLM baselines.

external_reproduction.public_artifact_policy: Public reproduction bundles must exclude private prompts, API keys, raw private caches, and account-specific files.

required_artifacts: power curve or detectable effect note
direct API redaction and submission checklist

milestones.name: freeze-protocol-fields
milestones.exit_criteria: Protocol fields for provider provenance, execution level, contamination tier, statistics, and claim boundaries are validator-enforced.

milestones.name: direct-api-pilot
milestones.exit_criteria: At least two direct-provider models produce redacted manifests through the v0.3 fields.

milestones.name: execution-sensitivity-main-table
milestones.exit_criteria: E0-E3 evidence produces ranking stability and intent-to-execution gap tables.

milestones.name: finaudit-pilot
milestones.exit_criteria: Injected-defect audit tasks report cross-audit and self-audit performance.

milestones.name: external-reproduction
milestones.exit_criteria: At least three independent reproduction reports validate public artifacts.
